The '''''Zeus''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
She was part of a convoy along with [[Thor (Strike-class)|''Thor'']] and ''[[Odysseus]]''. The convoy was to be attacked by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]], and the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] had to rely on [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and Blue Squadrons to give the starships enough time to escape into hyperspace.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on the side the player takes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
